title: AutoImeGold
text: AutoImeGold Controls whether the language-specific input mode in the Input Method Editor (IME) is disabled when the GOLD key is used. AutoImeGold = on | off Arguments on —switch the IME to direct input mode when the GOLD key is used. Once the complete GOLD key sequence has been entered, the IME is returned to its previous state. off —IME remains the same when the GOLD key is used. Default value on File section [upi] Related Links AutoImeOpen Enable the Input Method Editor (IME) for string fields for which the input mode has not been explicitly defined (by the field syntax YIME (IME on) or NIME (IME off)).
